arts.ttl: Maresca taking no prisoners with €45m Chelsea ace set to spark more transfer upheaval
arts.sum: In the shortest time, new Chelsea manager, Enzo Maresca, has made it crystal clear that he’s not a man to be messed with. Compared to the almost jovial relationship that predecessor, Mauricio Pochettino, had with his players, it’s a marked change for the dressing room to have to deal with. arts.ttl: In form ace has ensured “West Ham will be kicking themselves” as Irons hierarchy slammed
arts.sum: After making a huge number of signings in the summer, West Ham arguably haven’t had the start to the 2024/25 season that many people expected. arts.ttl: West Ham vs Chelsea TV channel, stream details, kick off time
arts.sum: Next up for the Blues is a trip to the London Stadium to face West Ham, who have endured a mixed start to the season under new boss Julen Lopetegui. They have collected four points from four matches, beating Crystal Palace, drawing against Fulham, as well as losing at home to Aston Villa and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's next Sancho call can unlock Palmer in ideal scenario vs West Ham
arts.sum: Maresca's squad has changed a fair bit since the opening game of the season against City and the arrival of Jadon Sancho has had a positive impact so far. Now, Christo can play as a nine, an attacking midfielder or as a winger.

arts.ttl: “Convince him” | West Ham interested in Premier League wonder-kid
arts.sum: West Ham are reportedly eyeing up a brilliant, young Premier League midfielder. With Lucas Paqueta’s future still being completely up in the air, it’s important West Ham prepare for all possible scenarios. While he could end up staying in East London, there’s also every chance that he will be found guilty of the betting allegations,...
